title: At the wet-lab / dry-lab boundary.
lede: Bioinformatics PhD researcher at UNC Charlotte and affiliate of the NSF-funded PreMiEr (Precision Microbiome Engineering) Research Center. I work where computational biology meets public health — developing Hi-C metagenomic methods that link antimicrobial-resistance genes to their bacterial and plasmid hosts in built and wastewater environments, turning large-scale sequencing data into actionable insight on how resistance spreads and persists.

columns.head: Researching
items: Linking plasmids to their bacterial hosts
